title: Reduce MoveTo tolerance before PlaceBlock from 3 to 2 blocks
description:
## Problem
The PlaceBlock handler pathfinds to `GoalNear(x, y, z, 3)`, meaning the bot can stop up to 3 blocks from the target position. In survival mode, the player interaction range is ~4.5 blocks, so being 3 blocks away can leave the target or reference block out of reach — especially when the placement position is around a corner or above/below the bot.

## Fix Applied
Changed `GoalNear(x, y, z, 3)` to `GoalNear(x, y, z, 2)` in the `case 'place'` handler. This ensures the bot gets within 2 blocks of the target before attempting to place, keeping the target and its adjacent reference blocks well within the 4.5-block interaction range.

## Files Changed
- `MineflayerAdapter/index.js`: Changed tolerance parameter in place handler

## Priority: P1
